packageRules.description: Disable lookup/updates for local workspace @sneat/* packages

Block automerge of major ESLint upgrades until @nx/eslint adds support. @nx/eslint 22.5.x peer deps declare eslint '^8.0.0 || ^9.0.0' and are incompatible with ESLint v10. See: https://github.com/sneat-co/sneat-apps/pull/3299
